title: Jaden's Nether Expansion X Archery Expansion
body: Changes the arrows of ArcheryEXP to go with JNE. You got stuff like the flint arrow, iron arrow (which litterally is just the arrow from JNE since it looks like iron :p ), gold arrow, diamond arrow, netherite arrow, and even the rope arrow from supplementaries cuz why not. This pack goes good with my main compat resource pack.
